creator: christoph.mallon@gmx.de
text:
Thomas E. Zander wrote:
>> A minor point: Can the message about switches, which are not available  
>> via OPTIONS, be removed?
> 
> May I ask why this is an issue?
> It simply is the case that we have additional switches which are used
> very rarely and are therefore not included in OPTIONS. I would like to
> make sure the admin person installing the port knows about their
> existence.

I see no reason to /not/ include all switches in OPTIONS.

	Christoph
